name: foss-tasks
description: Self-hosted, offline-first, cross-platform task manager (workspace root)

scripts.//: Consumers typecheck and run against @foss-tasks/domain's compiled dist/, so it is built first rather than relying on npm's script ordering across workspaces.
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:domain && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build:domain && npm run test --workspaces --if-present

//: npm honours `overrides` only in the workspace root, so the app's pin lives here. @powersync/* packages disagree on the @powersync/common range they accept; pinning one copy keeps a single instance of its runtime state in the bundle.
//allowScripts: Also root-only under workspaces. esbuild (vitest's bundler) needs its postinstall to fetch the platform binary.
